title.en: And Ye Tian waited quietly for news.

content.en:
The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor left and reported Ye Tian's situation to the Battle Gate.

And Ye Tian waited quietly for news.

A year passed, and the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor finally came again.

"Wanfa Dao Ancestor, after discussion, the other high-level leaders of the Battle Gate also agreed to your application, and they can give you a holy skill, but you must promise not to teach the holy skill to others, after all, the holy skill inheritance is one of the foundations of the Holy Gate, do you know that many Supreme Domain Ancestors in the Dark Sacred Domain do not have a Holy Skill Inheritance, and are even willing to fight with other Supreme Domain Ancestors for the sake of a Holy Skill Inheritance. Blood Gang Domain Ancestor said.

"I promise!"

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

Subsequently, Xuegang asked Ye Tian to choose a holy technique to inherit.

This time, the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor brought six holy skill inheritances, and Ye Tian could only choose one.

The manufacturing cost of the Holy Skill Inheritance is relatively large, and the Holy Skill needs to be cultivated to the Dacheng realm, and special treasures are needed to create the Inheritance, so the value of each Holy Skill Inheritance is unimaginable.

And once it is used once, others will not be able to continue to inherit it, unless they continue to make the same inheritance, but some holy technology inheritances are lonely inheritances, that is, there is no way to continue to make them, because the person who cultivated to the Dacheng realm has fallen, and no one can continue to cultivate this inheritance to the Dacheng realm, so there is no way to continue to create the inheritance.

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor brought by the Ancestor was naturally not a lonely inheritance, otherwise the Battle Gate would not agree.

"Six inheritances, choose one!"

Blood Gang Domain Ancestral Dao.

Ye Tian took a look at these six major inheritances, and finally chose one of the holy skill inheritances.

This holy skill is called Golden Thread!

The Golden Silk Holy Skill is a purely offensive Holy Skill, the power is very powerful, the attribute is the forbidden attribute of gold, and the demon with the golden Dao Holy Endowment can easily practice the Golden Silk Holy Skill!

"There are also these Eucharistic Fruits, which are the most suitable Eucharistic cultivation aids, and they are all useful until the Eternal Immortal Eucharistic is attained. This time, the Battle Gate gave you 100,000 Holy Body Fruits, which is enough for you to cultivate for a long time!"

The Ancestor of the Blood Gang Domain took out the Holy Body Fruit and said.

"Thank you Blood Gang Domain Ancestor!"

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

"Cultivate well, I'll wait for you to step into the ranks of the Supreme Domain Ancestor and enter the battle gate!"

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor smiled slightly, then turned around and left.

------------------

After the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor left, Ye Tian also left the Battle Realm Tower.

After becoming the Holy Son of the Battle Gate, the Battle Realm Tower was almost useless to him, and he didn't need to work hard for points, nor did he need to compete with other people, who were too weak to have any sense of combat experience at all.

Because of this, those real demons in the Dark Sanctuary will not go to the Battle Realm Tower at all.

However, for the other half-step domain ancestors from Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, the Battle Realm Tower was a place of supreme opportunity, and any exchange for a inheritance could greatly increase their strength.

And if they make friends with a half-step domain ancestor, a little routine and a little bit of information will be of great benefit to them.

Therefore, they were eager to enter the Battle Realm Tower and constantly communicate with other half-step domain ancestors.

Ye Tian returned to the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, the Human Realm.

After he came back, he began to cultivate the Holy Technique Golden Silk!

At the same time, he also began to take the Eucharist Fruit to refine his eternal and immortal Holy Body.

I have to say that the Holy Body Fruit has a very good effect on the refining of the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, if you rely on your own cultivation, if you want to cultivate the Eternal Immortal Holy Body to the Dacheng realm, then I don't know how many years it will take!

If he could use the Holy Body Fruit, Ye Tian felt that he would be able to cultivate the Eternal Immortal Holy Body to the Xiaocheng realm in 100,000 years, and to cultivate to the Dacheng realm in 3 million years.

Of course, the premise is to keep taking the Eucharist fruit, which will cost countless Eucharist fruits.

If it weren't for the resources of the battle gate, he would definitely not be able to do it.

In the blink of an eye, a hundred years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian had finally cultivated the Golden Silk Saint Technique, of course, he had cultivated it in the Time Array, so the time it took was naturally far more than a hundred years.

But for others, this amount of time was nothing at all, but Ye Tian had practiced a holy skill.

In the dark forbidden realm.

Ye Tian came here to test the Golden Silk Sacred Technique, only to see him facing a dark forbidden void in front of him, and with a stroke of his hand, a golden silk thread crossed the void in front of him.

Tear and pull!!!

The forbidden void in front of him was cut open like a piece of cloth.

"It's a terrifying power, tearing the forbidden void with your hands, I'm afraid that this kind of power can easily kill a half-step domain ancestor of the Sixfold One Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And this is just the introduction of the holy technique, once Ye Tian cultivates this holy technique to the realm of Xiaocheng, the power will be extremely terrifying, and his strength will also be increased to a very terrifying level.

Next, Ye Tian went back to retreat and cultivate, and continued to cultivate the holy technique.

In this way, another 10,000 years have passed.

After 10,000 years, Ye Tian finally cultivated the Golden Silk Saint Technique to the Xiaocheng realm, which was an incredible thing for the Supreme Domain Ancestor, but for Ye Tian, it seemed to be very simple.

That's the power of the Endowment!

However, Ye Tian couldn't use the Golden Silk Saint Technique too many times, one time was enough to consume one-tenth of his strength, so he could only use it once in a while in battle, otherwise if he used it continuously, his strength would be exhausted, and the enemy would not die, and he would be the one who died.

After Ye Tian's test, the Golden Silk Saint Technique of the small Cheng level could be called the full force of the top eightfold return to one realm and a half-step domain ancestor.

If in the future, Ye Tian cultivated the Eternal Immortal Holy Body to the Xiaocheng realm, and combined it with the Xiaocheng-level Golden Silk Holy Technique, the combat power that erupted would be even more terrifying.

Moreover, he hadn't used the power of the Extreme Dao yet, if he had used the power of the Extreme Dao, Ye Tian would now dare to fight with the top Eightfold Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor.

After cultivating the Golden Silk Saint Technique to the Xiaocheng realm, the cultivation speed slowed down, and I am afraid that it will take a long time to be able to cultivate to the Dacheng realm.

So, Ye Tian spent his mind on the Eternal Immortal Holy Body again.

It took hundreds of thousands of years for the Eternal Immortal Holy Body to finally cultivate to the Xiaocheng realm.

And at this time, Ye Tian's comprehensive strength was afraid that it would be comparable to the Ninefold Return to One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor.

And what is the concept of the Nine-fold Return to One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor?

In the Dark Sanctuary, some of the weaker new Domain Ancestors are just the combat power of the Nine-Fold Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors.

If it was replaced by a half-step domain ancestor in the realm, some of the new domain ancestors were afraid that they only had the top eightfold return to the first realm half-step domain ancestor, and they were even inferior to Ye Tian's current combat power.

In other words, Ye Tian was now able to contend with or even defeat the new domain ancestors of the Dao Mountain Realm and the Divine Heaven Realm.
